title: Observe and report on weather
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Observe and report on weather demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to work

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work instructions with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work instructions with supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare and use weather equipment according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use weather equipment according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use weather equipment according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Identify and report workplace health and safety hazards and risks to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report workplace health and safety hazards and risks to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report workplace health and safety hazards and risks to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to work

elements.title: Check weather and climate information

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise changed weather and climate situations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise changed weather and climate situations.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Anticipate likely impact of changes in weather and climate in respect to work tasks.

pcs.text: Report anticipated impact of weather and climate to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report anticipated impact of weather and climate to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report anticipated impact of weather and climate to supervisor.

elements.title: Carry out preventative action

pcs.text: Discuss information and confirm preventative action with supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss information and confirm preventative action with supervisor.

pcs.text: Undertake actions to minimise loss and damage

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake actions to minimise loss and damage.

pcs.text: Adjust work tasks according to weather and climatic changes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust work tasks according to weather and climatic changes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust work tasks according to weather and climatic changes.

elements.title: Monitor weather and climate

pcs.text: Access regular updates to determine ongoing suitability of current programs

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access regular updates to determine ongoing suitability of current programs.

pcs.text: Complete workplace weather records according to workplace procedures, and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete workplace weather records according to workplace procedures, and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete workplace weather records according to workplace procedures, and report to supervisor.
